falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish continuation, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) increases by 300% compared to the bottom_2024_aug pattern's ATR
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volatility would indicate a blowoff top scenario, refuting the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict's assumption of a bottoming pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a $50 billion quantitative easing program within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This explicit central bank intervention would create a clear external factor invalidating the pattern-based verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
